import json


def count_lines(filepath: str) -> int:
    with open(filepath) as f:
        content = f.read()
    return content.count("\n")


def find_user_by_email(filepath: str, email: str) -> dict | None:
    with open(filepath) as f:
        data = json.load(f)
    for user in data["users"]:
        if user["email"] == email:
            return user
    return None


def process_log_entries(filepath: str) -> list[str]:
    with open(filepath) as f:
        lines = f.readlines()
    errors = []
    for line in lines:
        if "ERROR" in line:
            errors.append(line.strip())
    return errors


def stream_to_list(stream) -> list[str]:
    content = stream.read()
    return content.split("\n")
